docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GABAI, KAREN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GABAI, KAREN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEQUEIRA, DAISY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GABAI, KAREN $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT GABAI, KAREN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SEQUEIRA, DAISY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SEQUEIRA, DAISY AS TO DEFENDANT GABAI, KAREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY GABAI, KAREN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SEQUEIRA, DAISY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $984.71 AS TO DEFENDANT GABAI, KAREN
